memoryArtifacts.headline: Simon II of Clermont-Nesle (c. 1210 - 1285/86)
memoryArtifacts.description: Simon II of Clermont-Nesle (c. 1210 - 1285/86) was Seigneur (Lord) of Ailly, Maulette and Nesle (in Picardy) (de). Note that there is a great confusion of names and titles within this family and with …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon II de Clermont於1208年出生在法國時，他的父親Raoul I de Clermont33歲，母親Gertrude of Nesle29歲。他於1242年與Adele de Monfort l'Amaury結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1286年2月1日在法國皮卡迪奧易波奧瓦斯享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon II de Clermont于1208年出生在法国时，他的父亲Raoul I de Clermont33岁，母亲Gertrude of Nesle29岁。他于1242年与Adele de Monfort l'Amaury结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1286年2月1日在法国皮卡迪奧易波奧瓦斯享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clermont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jacques, Georges, Normand, Pierre, Armand, Edouard, Gaston, Ghislaine, Gilles, Henri, Herve, Jean Francois.

French and English (Middlesex, of Norman and French Huguenot origin): habitational name from any of various places in France called (Le) Clermont, from Old French clair, cler ‘bright, clear’ + mont ‘hill’, i.e. a hill that could be seen a long way off. Compare Clairmont .

English (Middlesex, of Norman and possibly also Huguenot origin): variant of Claremont, from the Old French female personal name Claremonde, supposedly from ancient Germanic Claremunda, a hybrid compound of Latin clarus ‘famous’ + ancient Germanic mund ‘protection’.

variants.name: Clairmont
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adelard, Aime, Antoine, Aurore, Fernand.
French: variant of Clermont and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. The surname Clairmont is very rare in France.
In some cases possibly also English: variant of Claremont or Clermont . This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon II de Clermont was born in 1208, in France, his father, Raoul I de Clermont, was 33 and his mother, Gertrude of Nesle, was 29. He married Adele de Monfort l'Amaury in 1242. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 1 February 1286, in Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, France, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon II de Clermont est né en 1208, à France, son père, Raoul I de Clermont, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Gertrude of Nesle, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Adele de Monfort l'Amaury en 1242. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 1 février 1286, à Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon II de Clermont 1208 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Raoul I de Clermont 33 und seine Mutter Gertrude of Nesle 29. Er hat 1242 Adele de Monfort l'Amaury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Februar 1286 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon II de Clermont è nato il nel 1208 nel Francia, il suo padre, Raoul I de Clermont, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Gertrude of Nesle, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Adele de Monfort l'Amaury nel 1242. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 1 febbraio 1286, nel Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon II de Clermontが1208年にフランスで生まれた時，父Raoul I de Clermontは33歳，母Gertrude of Nesleは29歳であった。1242年にAdele de Monfort l'Amauryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1286年2月1日にフランスピカーディオイゼビーウベイスで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon II de Clermont(이)가 1208년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Raoul I de Clermont(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Gertrude of Nesle(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1242년 Adele de Monfort l'Amaury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1286년 2월 1일 프랑스 피카디 이스 보바이에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon II de Clermont nasceu em 1208, em França, seu pai, Raoul I de Clermont, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Gertrude of Nesle, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Adele de Monfort l'Amaury em 1242. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de fevereiro de 1286, em Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, França, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon II de Clermont родился в 1208 г. в местности Франция, его отцу по имени Raoul I de Clermont было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Gertrude of Nesle, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Adele de Monfort l'Amaury в 1242 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 1 февраля 1286 г. в местности бовеи, оис, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Simon II de Clermont nació en 1208, en Francia, su papá, Raoul I de Clermont, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Gertrude of Nesle, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Adele de Monfort l'Amaury en 1242. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 1 de febrero de 1286, en Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 78 años.
